examples: Now we have the recirculation system.
Well do you remember when we talked about the need for recirculation?
Install the additional coolant pump for exhaust gas recirculation.
The Solarlite Direct Steam Generation (DSG) combines two concepts, recirculation and injection cooling, to generate superheated steam.
One is exhaust gas recirculation, which pumps cooled exhaust back into the engine air intake, lowering the combustion temperature and reducing NOx formation.
